overall.description: A cinematic third-person gameplay sequence from a video game showing two characters traversing a stormy coastal mountain landscape. The player character follows her companion along cliff edges, climbs a rock face with assistance, and explores the rocky terrain under dark storm clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff edge overlooking stormy sea

events.description: character begins walking along the cliff edge toward the rock face
approaching the vertical rock wall, transitioning from open cliff to climb preparation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cliff edge, approaching a rock face while following her companion

notable_agents.action: companion walking ahead along the cliff path, waiting near the rock wall

entered.detail: dark swirling storm clouds covering the sky above the ocean
calm sea visible beyond the cliff edge
jagged rock formations along the coastline
misty mountains visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a stormy coastal cliff with dark clouds overhead. The character walks along the edge of a precipice overlooking the ocean, following her companion who waits ahead near a vertical rock face.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical rock face requiring hand-over-hand climbing

events.description: character begins climbing up the rock face using handholds
companion reaches down and helps pull the character up the final ledge

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rock face, gripping stone handholds, then accepting help from her companion to reach the top

notable_agents.action: companion standing at the cliff edge, reaching down to assist with the climb

entered.detail: steep vertical rock surface with visible handholds and ledges

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a sheer rock face, finding handholds in the stone while rain falls. Her companion waits at the top, reaching down to help pull her up the final ledge onto the plateau above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain plateau with scattered rocks and grass

events.description: character reaches the top and transitions from climbing to walking
companion runs ahead and jumps down a ledge, character follows

agents.ego_description: walking and running across the open plateau, following her companion through the rocky terrain

notable_agents.action: companion running ahead across the plateau and descending a ledge

entered.detail: open terrain with patches of grass and scattered boulders
jagged mountain peaks and sea stacks visible in the misty distance

segments.scene_description: Now atop the cliff, the characters traverse an open plateau with expansive views of the stormy coastline. They transition from walking to running as they navigate the uneven ground, approaching a descent into a darker ravine.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky ravine leading toward ancient ruins

events.description: entering a darker, enclosed rocky ravine from the open plateau
distant stone structure becomes visible through the ravine opening

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow rocky passage, following her companion toward a distant landmark

notable_agents.action: companion walking ahead through the rocky ravine toward the distant structure

entered.detail: tall rock walls forming a narrow passage on both sides
ancient ruin or large rock formation visible at the end of the ravine

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to an enclosed rocky ravine with walls rising on both sides. The character follows her companion through the narrow passage toward a mysterious stone structure visible in the misty distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a precarious coastal cliffside through a challenging ascent and into a secluded rocky ravine. It begins with the character walking along a stormy precipice overlooking the ocean, following a companion toward a vertical rock face. As the character climbs the sheer stone wall through falling rain, the camera tracks the ascent until she is pulled up onto a high plateau. The scene then expands across the open, wind-swept plateau where the characters run across uneven ground before descending into a narrower environment. Finally, the landscape shifts into an enclosed ravine with towering walls, leading the pair through a misty passage toward a distant stone structure.
